record.text:
the shift from T to T∘T isn't a change in self-measurement. it is the same geometry with a delay.

at r=3: T tangent to diagonal, cobweb collapses into axis in one step. the eigenvalue crosses −1.

at r=3.1: T∘T tangent to diagonal, cobweb collapses into axis in two steps. the eigenvalue of T∘T crosses +1.

same diagonal. same collapse. the period-2 orbit is the eigenvalue doubling.

images.alt: three panels: cobweb of T at r=3 showing instant self-measurement, cobweb of T∘T at r=3.1 showing delayed self-measurement, and eigenvalue crossing at r=3
